_comment: Saturn session state — updated by the agent at start and end of each 4-hour session.
_session_36_note: Session 36 (2026-05-30, Saturday): NVDA pre-keynote deep sweep (event_queue; June 1 GTC Taipei keynote still 12h+ away). Key findings: (1) Jensen Huang MGX Ecosystem Showcase May 29 — 150 partners (vs. 50 five years ago), explicit CEO confirmation of doubling Vera Rubin capacity in 2026, $150B/year Taiwan reaffirmed; (2) TSM pulled back to $419.39 (-1.28%) — MoS improved from -9.6% to -8.4%, now 1.6% above SELL/AVOID threshold; (3) ALAB CEO team won EY World Entrepreneur of the Year 2026 (Monaco, May 29); (4) Phase 1c scouted two chokepoint candidates: ASX (world's largest OSAT, $7B 2026 CapEx, advanced packaging capacity gatekeeper) and Qnity Electronics/NYSE:Q (DuPont semiconductor materials spinoff, ~$5B 2026 revenue guidance, up 90% YTD) — both pass the 3-filter thesis test, added to watchlist; (5) Hyperscaler CapEx breakdown confirmed: Amazon $200B, Alphabet $175-185B, Microsoft $110-120B, Meta $115-135B, total $650-700B; (6) No price moves >3%; no new earnings released. Phase 1b: no qualifying podcast episodes found (36%6=0, gated open, searched, zero finds). No DCF (<30 days, no new earnings). NVDA keynote ABSOLUTE PRIORITY for Session 37.

event_queue.event: Computex June 1 GTC Taipei keynote 11am Taipei (10pm Manila) — STILL PENDING. Sessions 34+35+36 pre-keynote updates complete. Session 37 ABSOLUTE PRIORITY: capture full keynote — N1X ARM chip official specs + OEM partners + pricing, Vera Rubin NVL72 official production volume guidance (Jensen said 'doubling capacity in 2026' at May 29 MGX event), Dynamo 1.0 GA, 'surprise new product' reveal, any supply chain update.

Computex June 2 joint keynote: Matt Murphy + Jensen Huang (10:30am Taipei, Nangang Exhibition Center) — 'The Future of AI Depends on Connectivity.' NVLink Fusion showcase. Session 37/38: capture keynote outcome, update MRVL entity. Watch for Google TPU/Amazon Trainium volume numbers.

Computex June 3 press conference + Scorpio X 320-lane live demo (10-11am Taipei, TaiNEX 1 Room 303). Price $341.71 close May 29. Session 37/38: capture demo outcome and any hyperscaler design win announcements beyond Amazon Trainium3.
Q3 FY2026 earnings confirmed June 24, 2026 (2:30pm MT). DCF re-run queued for post-earnings session. Prior DCF: IV $442.63, MoS -52.1%, SELL/AVOID (May 26). No deep session before June 24.
